scripts.dev: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run-many -t dev --projects=cms,front --parallel
scripts.build: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run-many -t build --projects=cms,front --parallel
scripts.start:cms: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run cms:start
scripts.preview:front: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run front:preview
scripts.generate:api: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run front:generate:api
scripts.affected:build: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx affected -t build
scripts.affected:lint: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx affected -t lint
scripts.affected:test: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ADD_PLUGINS=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx affected -t test
